title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at State Bank of India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at State Bank of India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with State Bank of India! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About State Bank of India:
State Bank of India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India!
